eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Clallam, WA; at 9:56 AM on JUL 2, 2019 Effective until 12:56 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is the Clallam County Sheriff's Office Emergency Management Section conducting a test of the Emergency Alert
System. In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
